title: IPX-539 On The Night Of Our Class Reunion, Because Of A Sudden Rainstorm I Missed My Last Train Home, And I Had To Spend the Night At A Hotel With A Loser... Nanami Misaki
description: My husband is busy with work, and even on his wedding anniversary, he gives priority to work. At that time, by the way, the alumni association was contacted. Nanami decides to go from nostalgia when she learns that she has a former boyfriend. On the night when I enjoyed the restart, sudden heavy rain ... Then Tsukasa suggested "to take shelter from the rain at the hotel" ... A depressive erection NTR drama where a married woman who swore innocence on the occasion of marriage remembers her past self who was a bitch in sex with her ex-boyfriend and spree all night long!
